title: Documentation update suggestion for External Tools winscp
author: RolfWojtech
body_snippet:
This isn't really a bug, more of a documentation oversight:

I have setup winscp as an external tool as outlined in https://mremoteng.readthedocs.io/en/latest/external_tools_cheat_sheet.html#id1

I tried to use a winscp to a machine with a non-standard SSH port and a password that happens to include an exclamation mark.

First part of the documentation error is that the suggested string omits the port:
`scp://%Username%:%Password%@%Hostname%/`
correct use of the port would be:
`scp://%U...

iterations.description: The documentation for External Tools needs an update to include specific guidance for WinSCP, improving user experience.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:

**Commit:** **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**

**Download latest beta:** **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---
_Automated by mRemoteNG Issue Intelligence System_

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The documentation for External Tools needs an update to include specific guidance for WinSCP, improving user experience.
Approach: Add a new section or update an existing one in 'mRemoteNGDocumentation/external_tools_cheat_sheet.rst' to provide clear instructions and best practices for configuring WinSCP as an external tool.
